hooks.commandWindows: node -e "var cp=require('child_process');var path=require('path');var hook=process.argv[1];var root='';try{root=cp.execSync('git rev-parse --show-toplevel',{stdio:['ignore','pipe','ignore']}).toString().trim();}catch(e){root='';}if(!root){process.exit(0);}var target=path.join(root,'.bee','bin','hooks',hook);var r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[target,'--source=repo'],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.error){process.exit(1);}process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status);" bee-session-init.mjs
